word: H6548 - פַּרְעֹה חׇפְרַע - Parʻôh Chophraʻ - par-o' khof-rah' - Pharaoh-hophra

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרעה חפרע

Transliteration: par‛ôh chophra‛

Phonetic: par-o' khof-rah'

BDB Definition:

Pharaoh-hophra = "the great house -covering evil"
  1. the Pharaoh of Egypt at the time of the conquest by Nebuchadnezzar

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
